hooks.command: powershell -NonInteractive -Command "$f = '${file}'; $roots = @('prana-api','prana-portal','prana-mobile','prana-ai','prana-ask'); $relevant = $roots | Where-Object { $f -like "*$_*" }; if ($relevant) { Write-Host ''; Write-Host '[AUTO-ENFORCE] Running rule checks on edited file...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; $result = python 'C:/Nilesh/claude-code/prana-api/scripts/enforce_rules.py' 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host '[AUTO-ENFORCE] VIOLATIONS FOUND — fix before proceeding:' -ForegroundColor Red; $result | Write-Host } else { Write-Host '[AUTO-ENFORCE] All rules passed.' -ForegroundColor Green } }"
